title: Upper Yard Splits the Fighters
description: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey!! You can't go down there!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You mean you want to fight me?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I'm warning you; I'll use the impact!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: We must heal them immediate- tely!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Wuuuu!!! PHuf PHuf PHUF PHUF me!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I do not care about the past!!

summary: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
